privileged_info_summary: Hospital staffing synthetic dataset with 30 employees across 5 departments (ICU, ER, Surgery, Oncology, Pediatrics) with 600 rows of January 2024 shift data. Verified key metrics: total OT hours = 776.1 hours (matching claimed 776.1), total OT cost = $53,666.70 (within claimed range $47K-$62K), OT_REVIEW count = 7 employees (matching claimed 7). All employees work 20 working days with shifts of 6-11 hours. FLSA 40-hour overtime threshold correctly applied (29 U.S.C. 207). Hourly rates in data ($41.50–$52.00) are narrower than claimed range ($24–$62), representing experienced hospital nurses. SOC 11-9111.00 (Medical and Health Services Managers) is correct occupational classification.
